channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Trump says he overpowered an older Arnold Palmer in golf and reveals how golfers reacted to Palmer in shower
item.description: Former President Trump claims to have competed against golf legend Arnold Palmer at his own game, but he had a notable age advantage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 22 Illinois beats No. 24 Michigan 21-7 for its first win over the Wolverines since 2009
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Luke Altmyer threw for a touchdown and ran for another, leading No. 22 Illinois to a 21-7 victory over No. 24 Michigan on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cam Ward throws for 4 touchdowns, No. 6 Miami survives Louisville comeback bids for wild 52-45 win
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — Cam Ward's offensive line gave him plenty of time to throw on some big plays. On others, he created the extra time he needed to find his target on his own. The combination kept No. 6 Miami ahead and eventually created opportunities for teammates to win a shootout to remember.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 16 Indiana routs Nebraska 56-7 to stay unbeaten; Rourke injures hand and misses 2nd half
item.description: BLOOMINGTON, Ind. (AP) — Justice Ellison ran for 105 yards and two first-half touchdowns and No. 16 Indiana continued its best start in 57 years with a 56-7 rout of Nebraska on Saturday, matching the Hoosiers' most lopsided Big Ten win in program history.
item.dc:creator: PHILLIP B. WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Arsenal stunned by Bournemouth and Garnacho sparks Man United comeback
item.description: In one of the biggest shocks of the season, English Premier League title-chasing Arsenal has suffered a 2-0 loss to Bournemouth.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cleveland closer Clase stumbles again as Yankees score 2 runs in ninth off All-Star in 8-6 ALCS win
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Unchallenged. Unshakeable. Unhittable for six months, Emmanuel Clase hasn't been close to being the same closer in October. The Guardians haven't been able to count on him when it matters most.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings fan Tim Walz discusses security concerns about his Lambeau visit, praises head coach Kevin O'Connell
item.description: Democratic Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz delivered high praise for Vikings head coach Kevin O'Connell, who has led the Vikings to a 5-0 record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Online bidding for Ohtani's historic 50-50 ball up to $1.8M as litigation for proceeds continues
item.description: The online auction for Shohei Ohtani's 50th home run ball has just four days remaining, with the highest bid now at $1.8 million. The auction has been somewhat overshadowed by the legal situation surrounding the ball.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dallas Wings fire coach Latricia Trammell after 2 seasons
item.description: The Dallas Wings fired coach Latricia Trammell on Friday. Trammell went 31-49 in two seasons with the Dallas Wings, including 2-3 in playoff appearances. This past season the team went 9-31 and missed the WNBA postseason for the first time since 2020.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GJ Tigers soccer downs Central, inches closer to league title
item.description: In a big southwestern league soccer showdown at Community Hospital Unity Field, the Grand Junction Tigers stayed hot.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Grand Junction football cruises to third straight league win
item.description: Entering Thursday with their best start (6-1) since 2011, Grand Junction welcomed 4A I-25 league foe Centaurus.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Anaheim knocks off Utah in overtime, 5-4
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) - After winning two overtime games to begin its first road trip, the Utah Hockey Club closed out the trip with an overtime loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Cam Rising out for the season with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is out for the season after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey hands Utah its first loss, 3-0
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring an NHL-leading 16 goals through the first three games of the season, the Utah Hockey Club had a devil of a time scoring at New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Clayton Kershaw planning to pitch again next season
item.description: Clayton Kershaw says he plans to return to the Los Angeles Dodgers for his 18th season next year. The three-time NL Cy Young Award winner isn’t pitching in the current playoffs because of a bone spur in his left big toe that sidelined him for the final month of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Williams throws 4 TDs and TE Kmet handles long snaps for Bears in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: Kmet scored two touchdowns and was called into emergency long-snapping duties in Chicago's 35-16 rout of the Jacksonville Jaguars on Sunday at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs. Jaguars: Teams battling in early-morning tilt at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Jaguars have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. Inactives for the Bears are DB Jaquan Brisker, DB Tyrique Stevenson, OL Nate Davis, DL Zacch Pickens, WR Velus Jones Jr., DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominque Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
